title: Residue Record Schema
description: Schema for validating residue records written after floor outcomes.

residue_id.description: Unique identifier for this residue record.

floor_id.description: The floor ID this residue record is associated with.

outcome.description: The outcome that generated this residue record.

dominant_damage_type.description: The dominant damage type dealt/received during the floor.

most_used_skill.description: The most used skill by the player during the floor.

clear_time_seconds.description: Time taken to clear or resolve the floor in seconds.

party_size.description: Number of players in the party.

death_event.description: True if a death event occurred on this floor.

mutation_triggered.description: True if a mutation was triggered by this floor's outcome.

notes.description: Any additional notes or contextual information.
